title: More Mob Variants - No hostile mobs
description: Datapack to avoid the generation of hostile mobs (skeletons, spiders and zombies) of the More Mob Variants mod
body:
### What's this datapack? 

This datapack removes the variants for skeletons, spiders and zombies from the mod More Mob Variants.


### Features

Inside the folders, there are 3 files; you can delete any of them if you want to keep that specific variation.

You can use [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi) to load the datapack in every world


### Why would you want to download it?

You'll want to use this if you need to use other resource packs for hostile mobs.


### 
### All credits to [nyuppo](https://modrinth.com/user/nyuppo)
### 
### [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants)
